channel.title: Mailss Feed - bsvarslingertest@deltajohnsons.com
channel.description: Generated from your Mail.tm inbox for newsletter RSS reading

item.title: HKS38X arrived at ABZ from ABZ
item.description:
CHC Helikopter Service #38X arrived at Aberdeen (ABZ) at 02:45PM BST from Aberdeen (ABZ) after 4:44 en route
For more information visit https://www.flightaware.com/live/flight/HKS38X/history/20260413/0857Z/EGPD/EGPD
To edit or disable these alerts please visit https://www.flightaware.com/account/manage/alerts/
FlightAware
item.dc:creator: FlightAware Alerts (alerts@flightaware.com)

item.title: HKS16B tracking stopped near Fair Isle, Scotland from Aberdeen
item.description:
CHC Helikopter Service #16B tracking stopped near Fair Isle, Scotland at 12:33PM BST from Aberdeen (ABZ)
For more information visit https://www.flightaware.com/live/flight/HKS16B/history/20260413/1045Z/EGPD
To edit or disable these alerts please visit https://www.flightaware.com/account/manage/alerts/
FlightAware
item.dc:creator: FlightAware Alerts (alerts@flightaware.com)

item.title: HKS195 tracking stopped near Oseberg oil field, North Sea from Stavanger, Sola
item.description:
CHC Helikopter Service #195 tracking stopped near Oseberg oil field, North Sea at 01:40PM CEST from Stavanger, Sola (SVG)
For more information visit https://www.flightaware.com/live/flight/HKS195/history/20260413/1104Z/ENZV
To edit or disable these alerts please visit https://www.flightaware.com/account/manage/alerts/
FlightAware
item.dc:creator: FlightAware Alerts (alerts@flightaware.com)

item.title: Innlogging pГҐ FINN.no AS fra en ny enhet
item.description:
Et varsel for sikkerhets skyld.вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ BS
bsvarslingertest@deltajo...
Ny innlogging pГҐ FINN.no AS med kontoen din Kontoen din har blitt brukt til ГҐ logge inn pГҐ FINN.no AS fra en ny enhet. Hvis det er du som har logget deg inn, kan du trygt se bort fra denne e-posten.
Ny innlogging:
Enhet: Windows
Tidspunkt: 13:54:36
Dato: 13.04.2026
Nettleser/app: Chrome
Hvor: FINN.no AS
Var det ikke du som logget deg inn? Hvis det ikke var deg som logget inn, beskytt kontoen din ved ГҐ endre e-postkonto-passordet dittпїЅ
item.dc:creator: Vend-konto (account@vend.com)
